text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hey there!

text_block_list.name: Dia & Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for joining us for our first shrine visit of
the year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of us head to a shrine so Satono
Diamond and Kitasan Black can start off the new
year by conveying their passionate wishes to the
divine.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hm... I don't know what to wish for.
choice_data_list: Don't you want to win the Classic Triple Crown?
Don't you want to win the Classic Triple Crown?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but that's something I need to accomplish
myself, not something I should ask the divine to
intercede with.
choice_data_list: How about praying to break your family's jinx?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'll break that myself with my own strength!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
See? This is why I can never think of what to pray
for. I find myself stumped every year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking that into consideration, I suggest she
simply declare her goal for the year instead.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
What a wonderful idea! I won't be able to back
down once I make it official!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This won't simply be a prayer for victory, but an
oath for victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears she's going to make an incredibly
weighty pledge.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
What should I make my goal for the year,
though? It seems too obvious to simply aim for
the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
How should I run as a member of the Satono
family? As someone who aspires to be an
illustrious runner?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (How do I envision myself?)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (And what I should devote greater attention to?)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I want to run with pride and dignity.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to run with my head held high like
McQueen, and stand proudly before everyone as
a representative of the Satono family.
choice_data_list: That's a great goal. It's very true to yourself.
That's a great goal. It's very true to yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To run with the elegance of a diamond—a goal
only one raised from a young age to be an elite
runner would have.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It looks like you've made up your mind too, Kita.
Then come on, let's go pray!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I want to perform well in the senior Spring Triple
Crown and receive a lot of support! And I want to
make everyone smile!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win the Classic Triple Crown! As an
Umamusume of the Satono family, I vow to put on
a dazzling performance on the track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although they're entering different races, they
have the same glimmer in their eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's as if they'll be running in parallel until the
fateful day when their paths cross. I feel the
strength of their childhood bond.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! People are slowly starting to take notice of
me, so I'm gonna run as best as I can to get more
fans!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. Unfortunately for you, I plan to captivate
everyone with running that's just as dazzling as
the jewel I'm named after.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! That won't matter if I steal all their hearts
first at the Senior Spring Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Grrr... Then I'll simply turn the tables once again
at the Classic Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Dia & Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
Rrrrgh! Victory shall be mine!
Hnngh! I'm gonna win this for sure!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Let's settle this with a New Year's showdown!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to worry, Trainer. A New Year's
contest is an annual event for us.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It's the perfect way to settle things!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both of them are becoming quite heated and
show no signs of calling this off. But if they do
this every year, then I suppose there's no
danger...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Let's have Trainer decide our competition!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Fine by me! Be sure to pick something we can
really go all out in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to think of a no-holds-barred competition
that seems appropriate for New Year's.
choice_data_list: See who can cheer best for the relay race!

See who can collect the most mochi at a
mochi-tossing event!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, you mean the New Year's Relay Race, right?
Let's see... They should be passing by here any
moment!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
All right, it's a cheering contest, then! Trainer,
you be the judge!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ah, I can see the front of the pack coming up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
COME OOON! Make a break from the back and
steal the lead! It's time to push through!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You can do it! You're catching up! Yes, that's it!
Keep up the pace!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The leading contenders sprint past us in the blink
of an eye.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Right, let's head to the next checkpoint!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That's up at the top of the mountain, right? Okay!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The uphill section is tough for everyone! Hang in
there! Don't give up!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You've got to keep it together! Don't push
yourself too hard! Just go at your own pace!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Let's move to the next spot!
choice_data_list: Hold on! How far are we—

text_block_list.name: Dia & Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
THIS IS THE LAST STRETCH!
YOU CAN DO IIIT!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Aaand both teams cross the finish line at nearly
the same time!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Phew, that was fun! I worked up a good sweat!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That was more exciting than I thought it would
be!
Well, Trainer? Who do you think cheered the
best?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Well, at least I don't need to worry about
gaining any holiday weight.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Mochi-tossing?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The shrine staff throw mochi cakes to visitors
during New Year's! Whoever collects the most
wins, right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I see! So we just need to pick up as many as we
can!

text_block_list.name: Shrine Staff
text_block_list.text: Here we gooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Aaaah!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It looks like there's gonna be a bunch over there!
You're miiine!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's going on? Eek!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
O-oh no, I got pushed out... The Umamusume and
the human areas are both so packed...
choice_data_list: Look on the ground behind you,

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's so focused on the mochi the staff are
tossing, nobody notices the ones that have fallen
out of reach or haven't been picked up.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh wow! There are so many back there!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: All right, I'm going to grab them all!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I got tons of mochi!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
What a haul! ♪ Let's head back and whip up some
red bean soup with these!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We buy some adzuki beans on the way back to
campus, and then the three of us fill our bellies
with some tasty mochi soup.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, a bite competition? Are we going to see
who can eat more food?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Erm... I think you misheard, Dia. It's a kite competition, not a bite competition.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oops, I guess I'm hungrier than I thought. But
okay! I've seen kite flying competitions on TV
before! It seems fun!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll fly my kite over there first!
Since you suggested this, you be the judge, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Satono Diamond has almost no experience
flying a kite, I show her the ropes—or rather, the
kite strings.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I see. So you control the string like that...
and anticipate the wind direction during the
run-up...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Haaah! ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Weird... It won't catch the wind and go up.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm up next!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond jogs a little and manages to get
her kite airborne. She watches the wind direction
carefully and skillfully catches the breeze.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you're so good at this! Okay, I can do it
too!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Here we gooo! Ah! It's up! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It's about time! The contest starts now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond employs theory and technique
while Kitasan Black utilizes her enthusiasm and
perseverance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their kite-flying styles are a perfect reflection of
their personalities, and both kites soar
majestically in the sky above.
